arts.ttl: Digne: France out for revenge against Italy
arts.sum: France will be out to avenge their defeat from earlier this year when they take on Italy in a UEFA Nations League clash at the San Siro in Milan on Sunday, defender Lucas Digne said.

arts.ttl: Retegui - the striker Italian football longed for
arts.sum: Atalanta's Mateo Retegui has gone from relative unknown to leading the Serie A scoring charts - and is proving to be the striker Italian football longed for.

arts.ttl: Italy v France - Which nations have produced the most valuable players ever?
arts.sum: On Sunday Italy welcome France to the San Siro in what will likely conclude their recent contest for top spot in Group 2 of their Nations League table. Luciano...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United Superstar Lauds Italy Mentality Ahead of France Showdown
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali inspired Italy to an all-important 1-0 UEFA Nations League victory against Belgium last night at the King Baudouin Stadium. After the game, the Newcastle United midfielder addressed the media. The post Newcastle United Superstar Lauds Italy Mentality Ahead of France Showdown appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
